# apt_indicators.txt — Government sector APT threat feed
# Loaded when sector: government (alongside government_sensitive.txt)
# Known APT C2 infrastructure and malware staging domains
#
# [APT29 / Cozy Bear]
*.cozy-update.net
*.solarflare-cdn.com
# [APT28 / Fancy Bear]
*.secure-mail-relay.org
# [Lazarus Group]
*.blockchain-wallet-verify.io
# [Generic APT C2]
*.c2-beacon.net
*.update-check-srv.com
